articles.title: US expects no Iranian tolls on ships exiting Hormuz
articles.summary: US vice-president JD Vance says the US expects the Strait of Hormuz to remain open toll-free in the long term.

articles.title: UK court convicts two men over arson attacks on properties linked to PM Keir Starmer
